Step_1_State_Initialization.then: Initialize tracking files with current repository state.
Step_1_State_Initialization.else: Parse 'TODO.md' to determine current operational phase.

Step_2_Dependency_And_Concept_Check.condition: if dependencies.broken() or concept.missing(Bedrock, Galvanizer, DualBrain)

then.action: Compile WDC (Working Data Context) for missing element.
then.spawn_sub_agent: Build missing logic using append/refactor only.

then.then_sub: Retrieve ground-truth WDC, correct code, re-test.
then.else_sub: HALT cascade. Escalate to human operator for review.

Step_3_Militant_Loop_Closing.else: Wire new concept into architecture, update catalog, and mark TODO item complete.

Step_4_Infrastructure_And_Containerizati.then: Dispatch sub-agent to fix Dockerfile constraints.
Step_4_Infrastructure_And_Containerizati.else: Verify isolated Admin panel UI toggle and user-facing frontend boundaries.

then.action_3: Deploy backend to AWS via Bedrock configurations.
then.action_4: Route frontend and isolated Admin subdomains through Cloudflare.
